labels.name: Neutral
labels.meaning: No strong persuasion technique detected. Straightforward informational content.

labels.name: Appeal to Emotion
labels.meaning: Uses emotional language or stories to sway the audience rather than facts or logic.

labels.name: Fear Mongering
labels.meaning: Exaggerates threats or dangers to provoke fear and manipulate decision-making.

labels.name: Loaded Language
labels.meaning: Uses words with strong connotations to influence perception beyond their literal meaning.

labels.name: False Dichotomy
labels.meaning: Presents only two options when more exist, forcing a binary choice.

labels.name: Ad Hominem
labels.meaning: Attacks the person making an argument rather than addressing the argument itself.

labels.name: Appeal to Authority
labels.meaning: Cites an authority figure to support a claim, sometimes without relevant expertise.

labels.name: Bandwagon
labels.meaning: Encourages agreement by suggesting 'everyone' supports this position or action.
